items.description: Star MadsLorentzen / ai-job-search AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.
Star Diolinux / PhotoGIMP A Patch for GIMP 3+ for Photoshop Users

Star iOfficeAI / OfficeCLI OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
Star addyosmani / agent-skills Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
